title: Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary
tagline: Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary — wildlife reserve of Gujarat

overview.short: Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Mehsana district of North Gujarat.
overview.description: Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary is a wildlife sanctuary in the Mehsana district of North Gujarat. It is one of the major wetland in Gujarat and it surrounds the Thol lake. It is famous for its migratory birds and was notified as Sanctuary in 1988 under Sec. 18 of Wildlife (Protection) Act, 1972.

topPlaces.description: Vadsar is a village located in the Gandhinagar district of Gujarat, India. The latitude 23.1556088 and longitude 72.4724133 are the geocoordinate of the village.

topPlaces.name: Vamaj
topPlaces.description: Vamaj is a small village situated near Kadi (a town known for its oil industry) and Kalol. Its Panchayat code is 162352.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The best time to visit Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary is Oct – Mar. Summers are 28–44°C and winters are 8–25°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel International Airport, Ahmedabad (24 km) and the nearest railway station is Ahmedabad Junction (23 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: Stays in Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary start from ₹2,500 per night, with options across 5 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Thol Lake Bird Sanctuary?
faq.a: The top attractions are Vadsar, Gandhinagar, Vamaj, Lilapur, Ahmadabad.
